recent_excerpts: CVE-2025-54987, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in Trend Micro Apex One, allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code via directory traversal in the management console.

SAP has patched a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-27681, CVSS 9.9) in its Business Planning and Consolidation and Business Warehouse applications, allowing attackers to execute arbitrar
SAP released 19 security notes, including a patch for a critical vulnerability in the ABAP platform that could allow attackers to compromise enterprise systems.
